# harmonic

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/harmonic"
```

Package harmonic computes harmonic \(divisional\) charts by multiplying each planet's longitude by the harmonic number and normalizing to 0\-360 degrees.

CalcHarmonicChart produces a full chart for any harmonic. CommonHarmonics returns a map of frequently used harmonics \(e.g., 5th, 7th, 9th\) with their traditional interpretive labels.

<a name="CalcHarmonicChart"></a>
### func [CalcHarmonicChart](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/harmonic/harmonic.go#L22>)

```go
func CalcHarmonicChart(lat, lon, jdUT float64, harmonic int, planets []models.PlanetID, orbs models.OrbConfig, hsys models.HouseSystem) (*HarmonicChart, error)
```

CalcHarmonicChart computes the Nth harmonic chart. Each planet's longitude is multiplied by N, then taken mod 360. The harmonic chart reveals N\-fold symmetry in the natal chart.
